---
name: New Skill
about: Propose a new skill for the skill mesh
title: "[Skill] "
labels: skill
---

## Skill name

e.g., `my-framework`

## Layer

- [ ] Orchestrator (multi-step workflows)
- [ ] Hub (domain coordinator)
- [ ] Utility (focused tool)
- [ ] Domain (specific technology)

## Category

e.g., `frontend`, `backend`, `database`, `devops`, `ai-ml`

## Triggers

Keywords that should activate this skill:

- keyword1
- keyword2
- keyword3

## Description

What does this skill teach Claude to do?

## Links to other skills

Which existing skills should this connect to?

- `linksTo`: [skill1, skill2]
- `linkedFrom`: [skill3]
